name: toggle-sm
visual_summary: The toggle-sm React component is a small, clickable toggle button often used in preference settings, allowing users to quickly switch between two states (e.g., light/dark mode, public/private). It is frequently placed next to other toggle buttons, and its small size makes it suitable for applications on smaller screens or in tight layouts. Developers can use this component to add a simple, user-friendly toggle functionality to their React applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-sm
Description: The toggle-sm React component is a small, clickable toggle button often used in preference settings, allowing users to quickly switch between two states (e.g., light/dark mode, public/private). It is frequently placed next to other toggle buttons, and its small size makes it suitable for applications on smaller screens or in tight layouts. Developers can use this component to add a simple, user-friendly toggle functionality to their React applications.
Style: minimal, inline, inline-block
Interactions: clickable, toggling, animate-options
Tags: toggle, button, settings, switcher, user-preference, state-change

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
